RuntimeTerror v1.0

How to run:
1. Extract the contents of this folder.
2. Double-click `RuntimeTerror.exe`.
3. The game will load its assets from the `assets/` folder using relative paths.

Included files:
- RuntimeTerror.exe
- assets/images/side-bar.png
- assets/audio/game_music.mp3
- assets/audio/jump.wav
- assets/audio/Time_rewind_sound.mp3
- assets/audio/falling_down_sound2.mp3
- assets/audio/powerUp.wav
- assets/audio/red_tile_death_sound.wav
- assets/audio/logical_tile_sound2.mp3

Packaging for itch.io:
1. Right-click the `RuntimeTerror_v1.0` folder.
2. Choose Compress or Send to > Compressed (zipped) folder.
3. Upload the resulting ZIP to itch.io.

Notes:
- This is the release build optimized for size and performance.
- No additional DLLs are required beyond standard Windows system libraries.
- Keep the `assets/` folder next to `RuntimeTerror.exe` so the game can load media files correctly.
